articles.author: Ivo Daalder
articles.title: NATO’s Ankara summit was a wasted opportunity - politico.eu
articles.description: Europe could have used the meeting to show the U.S. how it will take the lead — instead it just agreed to buy a bunch of stuff.
articles.content:
And they are right. Ankara, in many ways, was a lost opportunity.
The grandly named Ankara Summit Declaration is a one-page, six-paragraph boilerplate statement that isnt worth the paper it was writ… [+1590 chars]
